article_meta.title: New York Playbook POLITICO's must-read briefing informing the daily conversation among knowledgeable New Yorkers New Yor

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged quoted source language as author bias, used nonstandard/incorrect bias labels, and missed clear author-prose bias instances in headlines and framing.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Three of the four items are direct quotes from Sen. Gounardes, improperly treated as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are not author voice; only the selection/imbalance point is arguably structural bias, the rest are quotes.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed author-level bias such as loaded headers/phrasing (e.g., 'FEED FIGHT'), 'evading the prohibition...', and 'murky ethics' framing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used labels outside the allowed set (e.g., Political Bias, Framing Bias, Selection Bias, Advocacy Tone) and misapplied types.
